Apples from suckers of a flowering crabapple rootstock. Small, golfball sized. Very sour but not bitter or astringent. Fruit ripe on 9/9/2024. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
2403 Park Lawn Pl, Middleton, WI 53562, USA
Quite a lot of black cap canes along the path here on the edge of the conservancy. Some years are better than others! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
